KeysToEntries.Ammo_765Browning55grXtremeDefender_765_D: The 7.65 Browning 55gr. Xtreme Defender ammunition has a solid copper projectile with flutes and sharp edges penetrating deeply and creating temporary and permanent wound cavities. Compared to traditional JHP rounds, Xtreme Defender rounds provide better penetration and terminal performance.
KeysToEntries.Ammo_765BrowningFmj_765_Description: The 7.65 Browning FMJ ammunition has a full metal jacket projectile, usually with a lead core covered in a copper or other metal jacket. These rounds are intended for general-purpose use, providing good penetration and reliability, but they may not have the terminal ballistics of specialized hollow point or defensive rounds.
KeysToEntries.Ammo_765BrowningJhp_765_Description: The 7.65 Browning JHP ammunition utilizes a hollow point projectile that expands upon impact, creating larger wound channels and maximizing stopping power. These rounds are commonly used in self-defense and law enforcement applications where terminal performance is crucial.
